query:
insert into CoverageBlockExcludes (
                        last_collect_nr,
                        file_hash,
                        start_line,
                        end_line,
                        comment_hash
                    )
                    values (
                        $1,
                        $2,
                        $3,
                        $4,
                        $5
                    )
                    on conflict (file_hash, start_line)
                    do update set
                        last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                        end_line = excluded.end_line,
                        comment_hash = excluded.comment_hash
